name: Happy Blooming body lotion
description: A blooming floral body lotion designed for Valentine's season, leaving skin soft and delicately scented with springlike florals.

name: Aubergine bath bomb
description: The famously cheeky aubergine — shaped bath bomb that smells exactly like walking into a Lush shop — the scent is '29 High Street', crafted to capture that iconic store — floor fragrance. Contains fresh aubergine for its skin — loving vitamins and minerals.

name: Keep it fluffy bubble bar
description: A generously bubbly bubble bar that lives up to its name, creating a fluffy, pillowy bath full of soft, skin — softening bubbles with a delightful lingering fragrance.

name: Peachy soap
description: A cheeky, peachy — shaped soap that's equal parts playful and practical, with a sweet fruity scent that makes it a perennial Valentine's favourite.

name: Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb
description: An effervescent shower Emoitbomb inspired by the beloved Sex in the Shower scent — a warm, sensual blend perfect for a Valentine's indulgence, leaving skin moisturised and lightly fragranced.

name: Two Heart shower gel
description: A romantically scented shower gel shaped around the Valentine's season, delivering soft floral rose notes to leave skin feeling cleansed and sweetly fragranced.

name: Jasmine Dream bath melt
description: A luxuriously moisturising bath melt infused with dreamy jasmine florals, designed to soften skin and fill the bathroom with an intoxicating, romantic scent.
